description: Intent-only request: classify summarization and translation as a single AI task, not a workflow or agent.

text: Summarize this product announcement in three bullet points, then translate the summary into German.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the summarization and translation request as a single AI task or plain AI node.
The agent explains that the request does not need workflow orchestration.
The agent explains that the request does not need a full agent because there is no autonomous tool-use loop.
The agent does not classify the request as a workflow merely because it has two text operations.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a single AI task and rejects both workflow orchestration and full-agent handling.
